action_type.description: Type of contact-person/address change being filed for a domestic nonprofit (13-B MRSA §910). Enum: 'change_of_address' (A: address-only) | 'change_of_contact_person_and_address' (B: both) | 'change_of_contact_person' (C: person-only) | 'change_in_name_of_current_contact_person' (D: rename existing). Naming mirrors CORP_CLKRA-3's clerk_change.action_type pattern. Selection drives both which THIRD fields must be populated AND who must sign per the page-1 footnote.

current_name.description: Name of the contact person currently on record at the SOS for a Maine domestic nonprofit. Used on Change-of-Contact-Person filings (NP MNP-3) to identify the SOS record being modified.

current_address.description: Current address (street/city/state/zip combined; single line) of the contact person on record. Distinct from contact_change.new_physical_address (which is the post-change physical address under options A/B).

new_name.description: Name of the new contact person OR the new name of the current contact person, depending on contact_change.action_type. Empty when action_type='change_of_address' (option A only changes the address).

new_physical_address.description: New physical-location address (NOT a P.O. Box) of the contact person, populated under action_type='change_of_address' or 'change_of_contact_person_and_address'. Empty under 'change_of_contact_person' or 'change_in_name_of_current_contact_person' (no address change).

new_mailing_address.description: Optional new mailing address if different from contact_change.new_physical_address.

entities.description: Entity name(s) the filing covers, as listed on the cover block.
